name: Table of Equivalents for Sugar Subatitutes
recipeIngredient: From: All New Cookbook For Diabetics And Their Families
Table of Equivalents for Sugar Substitutes
Use only after cooking or in uncooked dishes. (Sugar equivalents for various brand names of sugar substitutes are listed for your convenience only and not as an endorsement).
recipeInstructions:
Brand Name
Adolph's (powder) Substitution For Sugar
=================
======================
2 shakes of jar 1 rounded teaspoon sugar
1/4 teaspoon 1 tablespoon sugar
1 teaspoon 1/4 cup sugar
2 1/2 teaspoons 2/3 cup sugar
1 tablespoon 3/4 cup sugar
4 teaspoons 1 cup sugar
Equal (powder)
===============
1 packet 2 teaspoons sugar
1/8 teaspoon 1 teaspoon sugar
1/4 teaspoon 2 tablespoons sugar
1/3 teaspoon 1 cup sugar
1 tablespoon 1/2 cup sugar
2 tablespoons 1 cup sugar
Sucaryl (liquid)
================
1/8 teaspoon 1 teaspoon sugar
1/3 teaspoon 1 tablespoon sugar
1/2 teaspoon 4 teaspoons sugar
1 1/2 teaspoons 1/4 cup sugar
1 tablespoon 1/2 cup sugar
Superose (liquid)
=================
4 drops 1 teaspoon sugar
1/8 teaspoon 2 tablespoons sugar
1/8 teaspoon + 4 drops 1 tablespoon sugar
1 1/2 teaspoons 1/4 cup sugar
1 tablespoon 1/2 cup sugar
Sugar Twin (powder)
===================
1 teaspoon 1 teaspoon sugar
Sugar Twin, Brown (powder)
==========================
1 teaspoon 1 teaspoon brown sugar
Sweet N' Low (powder)
=====================
1/10 teaspoon 1 teaspoon sugar
1 packet 2 teaspoons sugar
1/3 teaspoon 1 tablespoon sugar
1 teaspoon 1/4 cup sugar
1 1/4 teaspoon 1/3 cup sugar
2 teaspoons 1/2 cup sugar
4 teaspoons 1 cup sugar
Sweet N' Low, Brown (powder)
============================
1/4 teaspoon 1 tablespoon brown sugar
1 teaspoon 1/4 cup brown sugar
1 1/3 teaspoons 1/3 cup brown sugar
2 teaspoons 1/2 cup brown sugar
4 teaspoons 1 cup brown sugar
Sweet'ner (powder)
==================
1 packet 2 teaspoons sugar
Sweet Magic (powder)
====================
1 packet 2 teaspoons sugar
Sweet One (powder)
==================
1 packet 2 teaspoons sugar
3 packets 1/4 cup sugar
4 packets 1/3 cup sugar
6 packets 1/2 cup sugar
12 packets 1 cup sugar
